name: Family Cruises
description: Kid-friendly activities, clubs for all ages, family cabins, and entertainment for everyone

name: Adults-Only Cruises
description: No children, sophisticated atmosphere, premium dining, and quiet spaces

name: Luxury Cruises
description: All-inclusive, butler service, small ships, exotic ports, and personalized attention

name: River Cruises
description: Intimate ships, inland waterways, city center docking, and cultural immersion

name: Expedition Cruises
description: Remote destinations, zodiac landings, expert guides, and adventure focus

name: Solo Traveller Cruises
description: Single cabins, solo meetups, no single supplements, and social opportunities

description: Easy itineraries, affordable, popular routes, and introductory pricing

name: Honeymoon Cruises
description: Romantic atmosphere, couples dining, beautiful destinations, and special touches

name: Senior Cruises
description: Relaxed pace, enrichment lectures, accessible facilities, and traditional cruising

name: Budget Cruises
description: Low base price, value lines, short itineraries, and sales promotions
